allow: Bash(for dir in Data Logic Presentation)

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; [Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $template = @'<toast duration=\\"short\\"><visual><binding template=\\"ToastText02\\"><text id=\\"1\\">Test</text><text id=\\"2\\">Hello</text></binding></visual></toast>'@; $xml = New-Object Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument; $xml.LoadXml\($template\); $toast = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification]::new\($xml\); [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier\('Claude Code'\).Show\($toast\) }")
